---
title: "Dual bruk av tobakksprodukt og/eller vape"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    fig-cap-location: bottom
execute:
 echo: false
---


```{r}
#| label: setup
#| warning: false

library("highdir")
source("c:/Users/ykama/Git-hdir/tot/reports/tobakkstat2025.R")

gender <- data.table(
  kjonn = c("1", "2", "Total"),
  kjonnCat = c("Menn", "Kvinner", "Total")
)

```

## Dual bruk

```{r}

dualDT[gender, gender := i.kjonnCat, on = "kjonn"]

spec_dual <- hd_spec(data = dualDT, x = "type", y = "percentage", group = "gender", n = "n_outcome_1")
opts_dual <- hd_opts(title = "Dual bruk", yint = 2)

hd_make(spec_dual, "column", opts = opts_dual)

```



# Sigarett og snus

```{r}

rs[gender, gender := i.kjonnCat, on = "kjonn"]

spec_rs <- hd_spec(data = rs, x = "gender", y = "percentage", n = "n_outcome_1")
opts_rs <- hd_opts(title = "Dual: Sigarett og snus", yint = 2)

hd_make(spec_rs, "column", opts = opts_rs)
```

# Sigarett og vipe

```{r}

re[gender, gender := i.kjonnCat, on = "kjonn"]

spec_re <- hd_spec(data = re, x = "gender", y = "percentage", n = "n_outcome_1")
opts_re <- hd_opts(title = "Dual: Sigarett og snus", yint = 2)

hd_make(spec_re, "column", opts = opts_re)
```

# Snus + vipe


```{r}

se[gender, gender := i.kjonnCat, on = "kjonn"]

spec_se <- hd_spec(data = se, x = "gender", y = "percentage", n = "n_outcome_1")
opts_se <- hd_opts(title = "Dual: Sigarett og snus", yint = 2)

hd_make(spec_se, "column", opts = opts_se)
```
